channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Blue Origin Rocket Explosion Is Bad News For Both Jeff Bezos And NASA

media:content.media:description: The New Glenn rocket will remain grounded while the investigation is conducted.

item.description: Space exploration is filled with setbacks, but the spectacular explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket on Thursday night marked a significant blow to not only the company, which was founded by billionaire Jeff Bezos, but also NASA, with the...
item.content:encoded: Space exploration is filled with setbacks, but the spectacular explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket on Thursday night marked a significant blow to not only the company, which was founded by billionaire Jeff Bezos, but also NASA, with the...

item.title: What To Know About Manhattanhenge, New York's Sunset Spectacle

media:content.media:description: Manhattanhenge happens about three weeks before and after the summer solstice.

item.description: The traditional viewing spots are along the city's broad east-west thoroughfares: 14th Street, 23rd Street, 34th Street, 42nd Street and 57th Street.
item.content:encoded: The traditional viewing spots are along the city's broad east-west thoroughfares: 14th Street, 23rd Street, 34th Street, 42nd Street and 57th Street.

item.title: UAE Struck Dozens Of Targets In Iran With US and Israel Help: Report

media:content.media:description: A number of reports in recent weeks have highlighted growing UAE-Israel coordination during the war.

item.description: The report, quoting people in the know, points to a deeper involvement than was previously known in the air campaign led by the US and Israel.
item.content:encoded: The report, quoting people in the know, points to a deeper involvement than was previously known in the air campaign led by the US and Israel.

item.title: No Visibility, Narrow Tunnels: 3-Nation Laos Cave Rescue Team Faces Hurdles

media:content.media:description: The villagers had reportedly entered the cave last week to look for valuable minerals.

item.description: Rescue teams had pumped water out of the flooded cave's passages, but a morning rainstorm complicated their work.
item.content:encoded: Rescue teams had pumped water out of the flooded cave's passages, but a morning rainstorm complicated their work.

item.title: Tomatoes Become Latest Symbol Of America's Affordability Squeeze

media:content.media:description: US tariffs collected on tomatoes ballooned from just $16,424 in 2024 to nearly $4.6 million.

item.description: Prices for those red orbs have soared more than any other food product over the past year to cement a spot as one of the consumer headaches du jour.
item.content:encoded: Prices for those red orbs have soared more than any other food product over the past year to cement a spot as one of the consumer headaches du jour.

item.title: Russian Spies Aggressively Seek Western Technology As Sanctions Bite

media:content.media:description: Moscow is also trying to steal technology to help it keep pace or give it an edge.

item.description: Four years of international sanctions have hampered Moscow's ability to procure machinery, technology and research from Europe.
item.content:encoded: Four years of international sanctions have hampered Moscow's ability to procure machinery, technology and research from Europe.

item.title: Canadian Poison Seller Pleads Guilty To Aiding Suicides, Avoids Murder Trial

media:content.media:description: Canadian prosecutors had charged him with 14 counts of murder and 14 counts of aiding suicide.

item.description: The Canadian man who sold poison to distressed people worldwide pleaded guilty on Friday to 14 counts of aiding suicide but avoided a murder trial, an outcome one...
item.content:encoded: The Canadian man who sold poison to distressed people worldwide pleaded guilty on Friday to 14 counts of aiding suicide but avoided a murder trial, an outcome one...

item.title: US' U-Turn On Green Card Rules, Most Immigrants Won't Have To Leave America

media:content.media:description: DHS said on Friday that there had been no broad policy change.

item.description: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.
item.content:encoded: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.

item.title: Trump's In 'Excellent Health', But Body Mass Index Nears Obese Level

media:content.media:description: Trump has tried to fight off public concern over his age and stamina.

item.description: Trump had recently talked about how good he feels, even as he joked about his fondness for fast food and his minimal exercise beyond frequent golf outings.
item.content:encoded: Trump had recently talked about how good he feels, even as he joked about his fondness for fast food and his minimal exercise beyond frequent golf outings.

item.title: "Modernising Military With High-End Ops": Top Trump Aide's Praise For India

media:content.media:description: Pete Hegseth made the remarks while talking to delegates at the Shangri-La Dialogue on Saturday (File)

item.description: "India is powerful and modernising its military," Pete Hegseth said. He also highlighted that it is maintaining a balance of power, particularly in the Indian Ocean.
item.content:encoded: "India is powerful and modernising its military," Pete Hegseth said. He also highlighted that it is maintaining a balance of power, particularly in the Indian Ocean.

item.title: No Red Lines, No Deal: Trump's Iran Meet Ends Without "Final Determination"

media:content.media:description: Washington and Tehran have accused each other of violating truce.

item.description: Trump had earlier said in a post on Truth Social that Iran will clear mines it laid in the Strait of Hormuz, US will lift its naval blockade and ships will start moving.
item.content:encoded: Trump had earlier said in a post on Truth Social that Iran will clear mines it laid in the Strait of Hormuz, US will lift its naval blockade and ships will start moving.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: Trump's Meet With Aides Ends Without "Final Determination"
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: "Never Seen Anything Like It": Satellite Pics Show China Is Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos

media:content.media:description: Satellite image shows a fortified weapons storage installation in Xinjiang Uyghur

item.description: Satellite images show Beijing is building launch pads, bunkers and communications nodes near the isolated nuclear silos that hold the Chinese military's longest-range missiles.
item.content:encoded: Satellite images show Beijing is building launch pads, bunkers and communications nodes near the isolated nuclear silos that hold the Chinese military's longest-range missiles.

item.title: Trump Offers Free Tickets To Troops For White House UFC Event, But With A Condition

media:content.media:description: White House UFC event offers free tickets to US military personnel meeting fitness requirements.

item.description: US military members meeting fitness standards to receive free tickets to UFC Freedom 250 at White House.
item.content:encoded: US military members meeting fitness standards to receive free tickets to UFC Freedom 250 at White House.

item.title: Trump's Name Must Be Removed From Kennedy Center: US Court

media:content.media:description: The court said that only Congress has right to change the name of the venue.

item.description: A US judge on Friday ruled that the famed Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts had been illegally renamed after President Donald Trump and that his name must be taken down.
item.content:encoded: A US judge on Friday ruled that the famed Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts had been illegally renamed after President Donald Trump and that his name must be taken down.

item.title: "Trade Priority, Expect More Meetings": US On India Deal

media:content.media:description: The US official said that Donald Trump has made it clear that trade is a priority for Washington.

item.description: India and the United States are on the verge of concluding a highly anticipated interim trade agreement, with the deal expected to be signed within the coming weeks or months.
item.content:encoded: India and the United States are on the verge of concluding a highly anticipated interim trade agreement, with the deal expected to be signed within the coming weeks or months.

item.title: IMF, World Bank, Others Warn Middle East War Is Straining Energy Supplies

media:content.media:description: The global institutions said that the world economy remained resilient.

item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran has disrupted trade, rattled financial markets and raised concerns over global energy supplies, particularly through the Strait of Hormuz, a key route for oil and gas shipments.
item.content:encoded: The US-Israel war on Iran has disrupted trade, rattled financial markets and raised concerns over global energy supplies, particularly through the Strait of Hormuz, a key route for oil and gas shipments.

item.title: Ex-US Attorney Refused Questions On Trump's Role In Epstein Probe: Democrats

media:content.media:description: Democrats and some Republicans accused Bondi of trying to shield Trump from scrutiny.

item.description: In a closed-door interview before the House of Representatives Oversight Committee on Friday, Bondi also said Todd Blanche, who now serves as acting attorney general, had been responsible for the documents' release. Eps
item.content:encoded: In a closed-door interview before the House of Representatives Oversight Committee on Friday, Bondi also said Todd Blanche, who now serves as acting attorney general, had been responsible for the documents' release. Eps

item.title: Iran Preparing "Grand' Funeral For Ex-Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei: Report

media:content.media:description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei killed in US-Iran stikes on February 28.

item.description: Khamenei, who led the Islamic republic for more than three decades, was killed in the first wave of US-Israeli strikes that launched the war on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Khamenei, who led the Islamic republic for more than three decades, was killed in the first wave of US-Israeli strikes that launched the war on February 28.

item.title: 3 Chinese Astronauts Return To Earth After Spending 7 Months In Space

media:content.media:description: As China steps up its space program, its astronauts have carried out multiple missions.

item.description: The craft carrying Zhang Lu, Wu Fei and Zhang Hongzhang of the Shenzhou 21 crew touched down at the Dongfeng landing site in north China's Inner Mongolia region in the evening.
item.content:encoded: The craft carrying Zhang Lu, Wu Fei and Zhang Hongzhang of the Shenzhou 21 crew touched down at the Dongfeng landing site in north China's Inner Mongolia region in the evening.
